'''Fora Mardec''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] who lived in [[Jalor City]] with her parents [[Riic Mardec|Riic]] and [[Lina Mardec|Lina]], and a sister [[Sale Mardec|Sale]]. In [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], all of the Mardecs save Riic died in the crossfire when the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] attacked a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] cell.<ref name="AIR" />
